summary: Comprehensive testing of UI bug fixes completed. All critical features working: User/Admin authentication, Settings page with logo upload, Admin users management, Sidebar layout (no overlapping text), Dashboard display, and Clients CRUD operations. Backend API tests: 20/20 passed. Frontend UI tests: All features verified working.

minor.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for successful creation - not a bug, just non-standard HTTP status

critical_code_review_comments: Authentication: Both admin (admin@btpfacture.com) and user (rafik.remila@gmail.com) login working correctly
Settings page: Logo upload section visible with 'Changer' and 'Supprimer' buttons, all form fields working
Logo upload API: Returns 'logo' field instead of 'logo_base64' - working correctly
Admin dashboard: Shows ADMINISTRATION section with Utilisateurs, Demandes Services, Métriques SaaS links
Admin users page: Displays 53 users with status badges (Désactivé, Non vérifié) and role badges
Sidebar layout: Clean layout with no overlapping text, proper flexbox structure with scrollable nav
Clients CRUD: All operations working - Create, Read, Update, Delete verified via API and UI
Dashboard: Shows usage stats (Devis utilisés, Factures utilisées) with trial period indicator
seed_data_creation: Test clients created during testing (TEST_Client_*, TEST_NewClient_*) - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI bug fixes verified working. Settings page loads and saves correctly. Logo upload works via API (returns 'logo' field). Admin can access users management page showing 53 users. Sidebar layout fixed with proper flexbox and no overlapping text. Clients CRUD fully functional. Rate limiting (429) may occur if too many API calls in quick succession.

User login (rafik.remila@gmail.com).details: Login successful, redirects to dashboard, shows user info in sidebar

Admin login (admin@btpfacture.com).details: Login successful, shows Super Admin badge, ADMINISTRATION section visible

Settings page load.details: Page loads with all sections: Logo, Company info, Legal info, Payment conditions, VAT rates

Settings save functionality.details: API PUT /api/settings returns 200, changes persist on reload

Logo upload functionality.details: API POST /api/settings/logo accepts PNG/JPEG, returns logo data

Admin users management page.details: Shows 53 users with names, emails, status badges, role badges

Sidebar navigation layout.details: No overlapping text, proper flexbox layout, scrollable navigation area

Dashboard display.details: Shows stats cards, usage counter, quick actions, performance metrics

Clients CRUD - Create.details: POST /api/clients creates client, returns client data with ID

Clients CRUD - Read.details: GET /api/clients returns list, GET /api/clients/{id} returns single client

Clients CRUD - Delete.details: DELETE /api/clients/{id} removes client, returns 404 on subsequent GET

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are live and functional

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All reported UI bugs have been fixed. Database connection issue (DB_NAME quotes) was fixed. Sidebar layout issue (overlapping text) was fixed with proper flexbox layout.
